pi_items.source: setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py explicit references
task description, install_openc3.sh comments ('INST simulated satellite target'), and verifier.py baseline targets

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the built-in 'INST' simulated satellite target provided by OpenC3 COSMOS. Expected output paths are /home/ga/Desktop/cmd_tlm_dictionary.json for the dictionary and /tmp/cmd_tlm_dictionary_result.json for export metadata. The INST target contains known baseline telemetry packets (HEALTH_STATUS, ADCS, PARAMS, IMAGE, MECH, MEMORY, SYSTEM, LIMITS_VIOLATION) and commands (CLEAR, COLLECT, SETPARAMS, START, STOP, ABORT, IMAGE_DUMP, CALIBRATE) which the verifier strictly checks against.
